## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content strategy, production, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New POC:** Erik O'Brien is the new Engagement Manager, taking over from Ada for long-term execution.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Month 1 focuses on Bottom-of-Funnel (BoFu) content, including \~13 competitive pieces requiring legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Quality Issues:** Content has choppy transitions and misattributed stats (e.g., citing the Skip report for non-Skip data). GrowthX will fix the AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GA4 engagement metrics are unreliable (showing 100% across the board), and the team will investigate. Navan will track MQLs and opportunities as the Northstar metric.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**New POC:** Erik O'Brien is the new Engagement Manager, handling long-term execution post-Strategy Sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**3-Month Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Month 1:** Focus on BoFu content to build a "conversion wall."](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Months 2–3:** Shift to persona-AI and Middle-of-Funnel (MoFu) content.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Legal Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritizing competitive pieces now clears the legal bottleneck for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [**Volume:** \~13 more competitive pieces are in the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Cadence:** To maintain publishing flow, non-legal content will be mixed in.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Airtable Status:** Erik shared a new "Content OS status updates" view for a cleaner overview.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
      - [**In Review:** 5 (with Rich/Libby)](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Legal Review:** 7](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Second Draft Review:** 3](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Published:** 21](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Content Quality Feedback

  - [**Feedback from Rich:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Choppy Transitions:** Abrupt shifts between topics within paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Misattributed Stats:** Facts incorrectly cited from reports (e.g., the Skip report).](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Formatting:** Inconsistent European style (no initial caps for subheads).](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Choppiness:** Likely an AI pipeline issue; a fix used for another client will be applied.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Stats:** The process will be updated to pull specific quotes instead of summarizing.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [**Formatting:** The editor will correct subhead capitalization.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Performance & Tracking

  - [**GA4 Data Integrity:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Problem:** Engagement rates are 100% across all content, indicating a GA4 misconfiguration.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Action:** Moran will investigate the GA4 setup.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Bot Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [**Problem:** High direct traffic with 1–2 second sessions is likely bot activity.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [**Action:** Moran will analyze Cloudflare logs to identify the source (e.g., LLM bots).](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Status:** Growth is compounding, which is "at par" with GrowthX client benchmarks for this stage.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Bylines:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [**Problem:** Posts are published under "Navan Editorial," which may negatively impact SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add Navan employees as contributing authors to provide a human touch and build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Northstar Metric:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
      - [**Navan's Goal:** Track leads and opportunities from GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
      - [**Tracking Flow:** Website → Marketo (parameter pass) → Salesforce (opportunity creation).](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
      - [**Early Indicator:** MQLs tracked in Amplitude.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**GrowthX's View:** Conversion tracking is typically a focus in month 3.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
      - [**Navan's View:** Conversion data is a critical, immediate metric for accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Share the "Content OS status updates" Airtable link.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
      - [Fix the AI pipeline to resolve content choppiness and misattributed stats.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Correct subhead capitalization with the editor.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Propose a byline strategy using Navan employees.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Moran:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Investigate the GA4 misconfiguration causing 100% engagement rates.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [Analyze Cloudflare logs to identify the source of bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [**Nima:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
      - [Coordinate with Alona to implement lead and opportunity tracking from GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [**Rich:**](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
      - [Notify Nima if legal review bottlenecks require support.](https://fathom.video/share/rze4q2qghrhvgKy2FQWTVAn21YjvRWW5?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
